notes: Shopify store (Cloudflare-fronted; www variant serves the same store, apex canonical). Config-driven Shopify routing (adapters/shopify-config.ts): matched by origin host wisdomdentalsupply.com OR distributor alias, then extracted via the shared /products.json catalog path (shopify-catalog-extraction.ts) with the per-page HTML adapter (adapters/shopify.ts) as the fallback tier. variant.sku (brand-prefixed, e.g. DCI-7247, PRK-S343, RPI-DSF012) -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price (dollars string) -> price, variant.available -> stock. Shopify strips variant.barcode from the public list /products.json, so expect no GTIN/UPC (no lot/expiry barcode hook) and no unit_of_measure, same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. Net32 winning seller (227 wins, rank ~#16 in the winning-seller census). Catalog discovered via /sitemap.xml -> sitemap_products_1..3.xml then pulled in full from /products.json?limit=250&page=N (~7,309 products across ~30 pages); throttle paging (~350ms between pages) to avoid tripping the Cloudflare challenge. Verified live 2026-07-01: products.json 200 logged-out, 250/250 variants carried a price, 249/250 a SKU, 0/250 a barcode.
